creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
After installing and run py27-rainbowstream, this error occurs:
---
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/rainbowstream", line 6, in <module>
    from pkg_resources import load_entry_point
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 2999, in <module>
    @_call_aside
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 2985, in _call_aside
    f(*args, **kwargs)
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 3012, in _initialize_master_working_set
    working_set = WorkingSet._build_master()
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 662, in _build_master
    ws.require(__requires__)
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 970, in require
    needed = self.resolve(parse_requirements(requirements))
  File "/home/pf/.local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 856, in resolve
    raise DistributionNotFound(req, requirers)
pkg_resources.DistributionNotFound: The 'pocket' distribution was not found and is required by rainbowstream
---
